name: activity
invariants: output.ok === false || output.result.items.every(i => typeof i.id === 'string' || typeof i.id === 'number' || i.id === undefined)
_note: federation.activity is a lens-action macro (LENS_ACTIONS, not MACROS) that surfaces the federated shadow-DTU feed for the lens. It scans STATE.shadowDtus for entries tagged 'federated_signal', maps each to { id, summary, sourcePeer, createdAt }, sorts newest-first, and caps at 50. It NEVER returns no_db (pure in-memory) and returns ok:true with an empty items[] when no federated shadows exist. Non-federated shadows are excluded by tag — verified in federation-lens-macros.test.js.
